overall.description: First-person dashboard camera footage from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked Night City (Japantown) at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, stops at traffic lights, and ends at a major intersection with massive digital billboards. Heavy neon lighting in pink, cyan, and blue reflects off wet asphalt.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens from a stationary vehicle interior view at night in the rain. The driver accelerates and follows a white sedan through a right turn, entering the Japantown district marked by traditional gate structures and dense vertical neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises through Japantown's neon-soaked streets, passing under the district gate. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along sidewalks while the wet road reflects the vibrant pink and cyan neon signs of restaurants and shops.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection and stops at a red traffic light behind a black sedan. Pedestrians wait at the corners near crosswalk markings while the open intersection reveals more of the rainy night sky and surrounding neon-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with massive digital billboards and advertisements

slowing to a stop while camera pans left to view large digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the green light, turning left into a wide commercial plaza dominated by massive digital billboards. The car slows to a stop as the camera pans left to focus on a curved digital billboard wall displaying car advertisements, with the BU SHACK neon sign visible on a nearby building and palm trees lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban district that transitions from narrow, neon-lit streets into a wide, commercial plaza. It begins from a stationary vehicle that accelerates through a right turn, following a white sedan into the Japantown district beneath traditional gate structures and dense vertical signage. As the vehicle cruises forward, the environment becomes a blur of vibrant pink and cyan reflections on the wet asphalt, passing pedestrians with umbrellas along the sidewalks. The scene then shifts as the car slows to a stop at a red traffic light behind a black sedan, momentarily opening the view to the rainy night sky and surrounding skyscrapers. Finally, the vehicle accelerates through the green light and turns left into a sprawling plaza, where the camera pans toward a massive curved digital billboard wall and palm trees lining the street.
